title: Partners and service providers – Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Partners and service providers : Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada
We work with various organizations throughout the application process to help newcomers adapt to life in Canada. Learn about our partners and service providers or get involved.
- Accounts for representatives
- Designated Learning Institution Portal
- IRCC Portal for letter of acceptance verification
- Provinces and Territories Portal
- Provincial and Territorial Public Health Authority Portal

## Services and information

### Funding opportunities and initiatives
Find out about the various funding opportunities we offer

### Types of immigration status documents
Find the types of documents we issue to temporary and permanent residents to prove their status in Canada

### Immigrant-serving organizations
Discover how your organization or community group can better help newcomers adjust to life in Canada

### Start-up visa – Business groups
Become a designated organization approved to invest in or support start ups launched by immigrant entrepreneurs in Canada

### Panel physicians guides
Resources and guides for conducting standard immigration medical examinations

### International students – Designated learning institutions
Host international students by becoming a designated learning institution

### Educational credential assessment – Service providers
Organizations that assess and authenticate educational credential equivalency for immigrants

### Language testing organizations
How to become a designated test provider

### Centre for Innovation in Francophone Immigration
Strengthen Francophone immigration (outside Quebec) through innovative approaches, strategic partnerships, and improved accessibility to immigration programs
- Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada
